Package neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.separator.conformity

package neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.separator.conformity
Conformity checking for separator and scrubber mechanical designs.

Provides standard-specific conformity rules (Equinor TR3500, Shell DEP, API 12J, NORSOK P-002) that evaluate separator/scrubber performance against acceptance criteria. Checks are internals-aware: the rules that apply depend on what internals are installed.

    Description
    ConformityReport
    Collection of conformity check results for a separator or scrubber.
    ConformityResult
    Result of a single conformity check against a design standard.
    ConformityResult.LimitDirection
    Direction of the limit check.
    ConformityResult.Status
    Status of a conformity check.
    ConformityRuleSet
    Defines conformity rules for a specific design standard.
    ConformityRuleSet.TR3500RuleSet
